title: Generate Test Cases with Requirement Description One Character Over Maximum Length
description: Verifies that the system rejects or truncates a requirement description that is 501 characters — one character beyond the maximum allowed 500-character boundary — preventing invalid data from being processed.
expected_result: The system enforces the 500-character maximum. Either the input field prevents the 501st character from being typed (HTML maxlength enforcement), or a visible validation error states 'Description cannot exceed 500 characters' and the Generate action is blocked. No test cases are generated with the over-limit content.

test_steps.action: Navigate to the test case generation page
test_steps.expected: The test case generation page loads successfully

test_steps.action: Fill the requirement description with 501 characters (one over the maximum limit)
test_steps.expected: 501 characters are typed; the field may truncate to 500 or show a validation error

test_steps.action: Click the Generate Test Cases button
test_steps.expected: The system either blocks submission with a max-length error or auto-truncates to 500 characters

test_steps.action: Verify the error or truncation message is displayed
test_steps.expected: Message indicates the description exceeds the maximum character limit
